name: safebus-alberta
description: School transportation operations platform for Alberta schools and parents.

scripts.test:rls: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['tests/rls/student-roster-rls.sql','tests/rls/guardian-visibility-rls.sql','tests/rls/README.md']; files.forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('Missing RLS test file: '+f)}); console.log('RLS test files present:', files.length); console.log('NOTE: RLS tests are MANUAL — see tests/rls/README.md for instructions.')"
